scripts.build: npm run build -w nativecorejs && npm run build -w create-nativecore
scripts.create:sample: npm run clean:sample && node packages/create-nativecore/bin/index.mjs sample-nativecore --defaults --no-auth --local
scripts.create:sample:packed: npm run clean:sample && node packages/create-nativecore/bin/index.mjs sample-nativecore --defaults --no-auth
scripts.verify:sample: npm run install:sample && npm run compile:sample
scripts.smoke:sample: npm run build && npm run create:sample && npm run verify:sample
scripts.verify:runtime:pack: npm run build && npm run pack:runtime
scripts.verify:sample:packed: npm run install:sample:packed && npm run compile:sample
scripts.smoke:sample:packed: npm run verify:runtime:pack && npm run create:sample:packed && npm run verify:sample:packed
